messages.content: Output only space-separated integers, nothing else.

You are a time-series forecaster. Below is a univariate sequence of 16 integers in [0, 99]. Continue the sequence with exactly 4 more integers, separated by single spaces, no other text.

Sequence: 5 0 5 12 3 16 39 44 41 41 43 71 87 93 99 64
